# tenableio_assets (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of assets from Tenable.io workbenches.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all assets seen in the last 30 days (default)
data "tenableio_assets" "recent" {}

# List assets seen in the last 7 days
data "tenableio_assets" "last_week" {
  date_range = 7
}

output "asset_count" {
  value = length(data.tenableio_assets.recent.assets)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `date_range` (Number) Number of days of data to retrieve. Defaults to 30.

### Read-Only

- `assets` (Attributes List) List of assets. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--assets))

<a id="nestedatt--assets"></a>
### Nested Schema for `assets`

Read-Only:

- `agent_name` (List of String)
- `first_seen` (String)
- `fqdn` (List of String)
- `has_agent` (Boolean) Whether the asset has a Tenable agent.
- `has_plugin_results` (Boolean) Whether the asset has plugin results.
- `id` (String) The UUID of the asset.
- `ipv4` (List of String)
- `ipv6` (List of String)
- `last_seen` (String)
- `mac_address` (List of String)
- `netbios_name` (List of String)
- `operating_system` (List of String)
